summary: Iteration 4 testing complete. Extended /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py with TestFragmentsCRUD (7 tests) and TestIteration4Settings (3 tests). All 42 backend tests pass (100%). Frontend Playwright passes verified: admin tab order, Fragments admin CRUD + editor + show-archived, Channels per-card content fields + live update on home, Footer admin fields + live update on home, Splash 'Spinning glyph' inputs, Glyph SVG↔image switch, and WorldFragments random rotation (5 reloads produced 3 unique first picks).
critical_code_review_comments: Admin.jsx is now 1443+ lines — exceeds 700-line guideline. Consider splitting into per-tab files (FragmentsTab.jsx, ChannelsTab.jsx, FooterTab.jsx, SplashTab.jsx) for maintainability.

Fragments listing on admin showed '6 active · 8 archived' at start of run — leftover TEST_* fragments from prior iterations leaked into the DB. Add a periodic cleanup or stricter test teardown. (This run's TEST_ rows have been deleted.)

PUT /api/admin/settings requires the full SiteSettings model — any client sending only a partial diff will get 422. Consider accepting a partial update model server-side (matches the pattern used for projects/fragments).
seed_data_creation: Created one TEST_UI fragment via UI + one TEST_AR archived fragment via API during testing. Both deleted in teardown.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests live at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py — extend with new TestClasses; do not rewrite. Classes covered through iteration 4: TestSite, TestProjects, TestConceptArt, TestUpdates, TestSubscribe, TestAdminAuth, TestAdminProjectsCRUD, TestAdminArtCRUD, TestAdminUpdatesCRUD, TestAdminSettings, TestSplashManifestoSettings, TestAdminUpload, TestFragmentsCRUD, TestIteration4Settings. Admin login testids: admin-password-input, admin-login-btn (not admin-passphrase-input / admin-enter-button as the request suggested). All other testids in the request were correct. Settings reset to defaults at end of run (glyph_image=None, glyph_top='VITRUVIAN · CONSTRUCT', fragments_per_load=3, channels.discord.tag='Inner Circle', footer.watermark_text='Vitruvian Construct').
rca of the issue: No bugs found. All iteration 4 features (fragments admin CRUD with archive, random rotation, channel card editor, footer editor, glyph SVG/image switch + spin toggle) work end-to-end across API, admin UI, and live home page rendering.
